title: YTP: The Great Mighty Sin
description:
A small youtube poop I made. It seems to short, but I didn't really want to make it longer. 

You can buy the song (Otherworld) on https://itunes.apple.com/us/album/final-fantasy-x-original-soundtrack/id62445727  

THANKS FOR JHON FOX FOR THE FOOTAGE. I DONT OWN NEITHER THE FOOTAGE NOR THE SONG. I DONT MAKE MONEY OUT OF THIS VIDEO.
